nodes.label: AI as knowledge resource for unfamiliar domains
nodes.grounding_span: AI has been able to save me time from finding those answers

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: It's most directed towards a collaboration

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI is never fully correct and I find it's knowledge strength can differ depending on the domain

nodes.label: AI as systematic troubleshooter
nodes.grounding_span: Good troubleshooting involves isolating variables and narrowing down the issue

nodes.label: AI use for personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: I always choose to handle text-based communication myself

nodes.label: AI as force multiplier for efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It won't replace my job, but it will be a force multiplier

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: AI has been able to save me time from finding those answers

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: Given that we are touching critical systems, we usually don't give AI a task to fully handle independently

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I will still push to learn

nodes.label: Authentic human communication
nodes.grounding_span: AI outputs have language that is very inconsistent to human text communication

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'm glad it was able to take all of the information I gave it and synthesize it for me

nodes.label: Skepticism and caution toward AI
nodes.grounding_span: we are quite skeptic of AI addons and software, and aren't exactly jumping for joy about it unless there's a legitimate need for it

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for debugging
nodes.grounding_span: the troubleshooting aspect is also something I do myself

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: It will help me gain quick and synthesized information on areas I am weak in

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth questioning
nodes.grounding_span: I may ask a lot of 'why' questions to help me get the larger picture

nodes.label: Domain-specific expertise-driven boundary setting
nodes.grounding_span: How are you able to give AI good prompts that help bring insightful responses if you don't have a good understanding of what you're talking about?
